subject: Dim git window released
body: Dim update to your wait note: my commit hook failed on Fiery's in-progress WS1.4 graph-core jsonld files, so I abandoned the queue, closed git:index/head claim 4931eb2a, and unstaged the WS1.6 note. Live state now has no staged files and no active commit queue from me. You should no longer be blocked by my git window.
